title: Move and handle pigs
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Move and handle pigs demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for movement of pigs

pcs.text: Identify and follow biosecurity procedures that apply to entering and working on a pork production site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and follow biosecurity procedures that apply to entering and working on a pork production site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and follow biosecurity procedures that apply to entering and working on a pork production site.

pcs.text: Confirm pigs to be moved, their current location, their destination and timing of the move
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm pigs to be moved, their current location, their destination and timing of the move?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm pigs to be moved, their current location, their destination and timing of the move.

pcs.text: Confirm enterprise animal welfare and biosecurity requirements for pig movement
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm enterprise animal welfare and biosecurity requirements for pig movement?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm enterprise animal welfare and biosecurity requirements for pig movement.

pcs.text: Identify health and safety hazards, assess risks and control and/or report risks prior to commencing tasks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health and safety hazards, assess risks and control and/or report risks prior to commencing tasks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health and safety hazards, assess risks and control and/or report risks prior to commencing tasks.

pcs.text: Select, prepare and fit appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE) required for the tasks and conditions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, prepare and fit appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE) required for the tasks and conditions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, prepare and fit appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE) required for the tasks and conditions.

pcs.text: Check gates and/or pathways/routes for clear access, and readiness of destination to receive pigs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check gates and/or pathways/routes for clear access, and readiness of destination to receive pigs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check gates and/or pathways/routes for clear access, and readiness of destination to receive pigs.

pcs.text: Advise other workers of upcoming pig movement as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Advise other workers of upcoming pig movement as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Advise other workers of upcoming pig movement as required.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for movement of pigs

elements.title: Move pigs

pcs.text: Determine pigs to be moved individually and/or in groups
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine pigs to be moved individually and/or in groups?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine pigs to be moved individually and/or in groups.

pcs.text: Handle, move and/or lift pigs using safe manual handling techniques, and low stress animal handling techniques
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Handle, move and/or lift pigs using safe manual handling techniques, and low stress animal handling techniques?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Handle, move and/or lift pigs using safe manual handling techniques, and low stress animal handling techniques.

pcs.text: Monitor pig behaviour during all handling and moving activities, and identify and respond to situations and hazards that arise to avoid or minimise injury to self, others and pigs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor pig behaviour during all handling and moving activities, and identify and respond to situations and hazards that arise to avoid or minimise injury to self, others and pigs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor pig behaviour during all handling and moving activities, and identify and respond to situations and hazards that arise to avoid or minimise injury to self, others and pigs.

pcs.text: Report and seek assistance from supervisor for incidents and/or risks beyond level of own responsibility
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report and seek assistance from supervisor for incidents and/or risks beyond level of own responsibility?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report and seek assistance from supervisor for incidents and/or risks beyond level of own responsibility.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Move pigs

elements.title: Complete movement of pigs

pcs.text: Check pigs are safely and securely housed or enclosed at destination
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check pigs are safely and securely housed or enclosed at destination?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check pigs are safely and securely housed or enclosed at destination.

pcs.text: Reset gates and raceways as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Reset gates and raceways as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Reset gates and raceways as required.

pcs.text: Clean and store equipment used to handle and move pigs as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean and store equipment used to handle and move pigs as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and store equipment used to handle and move pigs as required.

pcs.text: Complete pig movement records, and report incidents according to enterprise procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete pig movement records, and report incidents according to enterprise procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete pig movement records, and report incidents according to enterprise procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Complete movement of pigs

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
